findings.description: Hardcoded credential literal found in skill source or SKILL.md — matches OpenAI / Anthropic / GitHub PAT / AWS / JWT / private key / DB connection-string-with-password / hardcoded password field. Aligns with Snyk audit and QAX commercial-scanner SECRET_* taxonomy. Distinct from E2 which catches reading env vars: P9 catches literal credentials baked into the package.
